title: Curator of the Null Chamber
description: Dungeon boss at the edge of the Vertex. A Curator variant that runs the void as a resource-management exercise. Quietly terrible.

steps.text: The chamber had no inventory, because inventory had been optimized out. What remained was a curator, a ledger with no rows, and a faint readout indicating that the room's MP pool had not been restocked since the third pass.

lines.speaker: Curator of the Null Chamber
lines.text: Welcome to the null chamber. It is, as you can see, within budget.

lines.speaker: Curator of the Null Chamber
lines.text: Correct. The budget was zero. The results are consistent.

lines.speaker: Faith
lines.text: Why are you fighting for this?

lines.speaker: Curator of the Null Chamber
lines.text: I am not fighting for this. I am closing the audit. You are, unfortunately, an open item.
